user.title: Connect to Nutify
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Nutify UPS monitoring server.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your Nutify server (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.use_ssl: Enable if Nutify is behind an HTTPS reverse proxy

auth.title: Nutify Authentication
auth.description: Enter your Nutify credentials for {host}. Leave blank if authentication is disabled on your Nutify instance.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Nutify
reauth_confirm.description: Your Nutify session has expired or credentials changed. Please re-enter your credentials for {host}.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Nutify. Check the host and port.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll Nutify for new data (10–300 seconds)
